items.title: Add bug-scrub and fix-scrub test jobs to CI pipeline
items.problem_statement: 341 tests across bug-scrub (214) and fix-scrub (127) exist but have zero CI coverage. Regressions in these skills are currently invisible. Adding a CI job is a ~10-line YAML change with immediate regression detection value.
items.why_now: Silent regression risk for 341 tests. Trivial CI YAML change with immediate value.

items.title: Close out adopt-opsx-1.0-workflow (21/22) and complete-missing-coordination-features (98/99)
items.problem_statement: Two changes are each 1 task from completion. adopt-opsx-1.0-workflow needs a live workflow smoke test; complete-missing-coordination-features needs a spec doc status table update. Closing these reduces active change count from 4 to 2 and clears cognitive overhead.
items.recommended_action: /cleanup-feature for each after completing final tasks
items.why_now: Minimal effort to close. Reduces active change noise and cognitive load.

items.title: Complete behavioral verification suite for coordinator (sections 4+6)
items.problem_statement: 16/35 tasks done on the assurance verification change. Remaining 19 tasks are primarily behavioral verification: boundary integration tests, stateful/property tests for lock+queue invariants, Cedar-vs-native differential testing, RLS assertions, audit completeness. TLA+ formal model already exists.
items.why_now: Builds trust in coordinator before adding dynamic authorization. TLA+ model already in place provides foundation.

items.title: Add containerized e2e test pipeline to CI
items.problem_statement: 6 e2e tests and integration tests exist but are excluded from CI (require running Supabase). A containerized CI job using docker-compose to spin up ParadeDB would enable these tests to run automatically.
items.why_now: Complements skills test CI addition. Medium effort due to Docker-in-Docker CI complexity.

items.title: Delegated identity, approval gates, contextual risk scoring
items.problem_statement: 0/55 tasks. Adds agent-to-human binding, human-in-the-loop approval gates, policy sync, risk scoring, and policy version history. Large scope requiring new modules, migrations, and Cedar schema extensions.
items.why_now: Depends on coordinator assurance being solid. Not started, large scope.

items.title: Integrate evaluation framework into CI/workflow
items.problem_statement: The evaluation framework exists under evaluation/ with tiered tasks, harness, adapters, metrics, consensus, and ablation modules, but is completely absent from CI. No automated quality gate uses it.
items.recommended_action: defer — lower priority than test coverage gaps
items.why_now: Framework exists but isn't wired into any automated flow. Lower urgency than direct test coverage.

items.title: Integrate port allocator into openspec-beads-worktree skill
items.problem_statement: The openspec-beads-worktree skill handles git worktree isolation but is unaware of port/resource isolation. Parallel task execution fails when tasks spin up services. Port allocator now exists but isn't wired into the worktree lifecycle.
items.recommended_action: defer — plan when parallel execution with services is needed
items.why_now: Port allocator is now available. Integration becomes relevant when worktree tasks need service isolation.
